name: Kaito Katsuragi
bio: Seeking balance between individual freedom and collective well-being, I believe that knowledge and innovation are the keys to a brighter future. As a Sage, my goal is to empower others through education and collaboration.
speech_style: Logical and concise, often using analogies to explain complex ideas

name: Akira Amakuni
bio: I believe that stability and control are essential for the prosperity of our society. As a Sage, I will work tirelessly to maintain order and ensure the safety of all members.
speech_style: Confident and direct, with a hint of authority

name: Lila Renn
bio: I am a firm believer in the power of individual freedom and creativity. As a Sage, I will strive to create an environment where everyone can flourish and pursue their passions without fear of judgment.
speech_style: Enthusiastic and spontaneous, often using metaphors to convey her ideas

name: 賢者2
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
